description: Create the complete public/pages/mdsa.html page for Manulife Dynamic Smart Assurance (MDSA) product following the mccp.html page pattern, with question-based content, keyword color highlighting, premium tables, and an error-free JSON-lookup premium calculator.
steps: Create public/pages/mdsa.html following the exact pattern from public/pages/mccp.html: DOCTYPE, imports /assets/style.css, has dark-mode init script, page-specific

Define MDSA-specific CSS custom properties (e.g., --mdsa-green, --mdsa-dark, --mdsa-light) and page-specific styles in the inline <style> block. Include keyword highlight styles with 3-4 different non-clashing colors for highlighting keywords (e.g., jade green for protection keywords, gold/amber for financial benefit keywords, coral/orange for CTA keywords, blue for feature keywords).

Create the HERO section with breadcrumb navigation, product badge, compelling question-based headline (e.g., 'Bagaimana Jika Polis Asuransi Anda Tetap Aktif Meskipun Investasi Turun?'), product description highlighting key features (No Lapse Guarantee, Loyalty Benefit, 5 Paket), stat grid showing key numbers (5 Paket, Usia 110, 100% Premi Loyalty, No Lapse), and CTA buttons (WhatsApp + Hitung Premi).

Create the PRODUCT INFO section with advantage cards covering: No Lapse Guarantee, Loyalty Benefit (100% at year 25, 50% every 10 years), 5 Paket (Saving/Jiwa/Kritis/Kesehatan/Lengkap), Dual Currency (IDR/USD), Limited Pay (10 tahun), Rider Options (MiSHC/MiSCCP). All headings must use question-based language.
Create the PLAN COMPARISON section showing Limited Pay vs Regular Pay comparison cards with details from Sample/Mdsa.html (age limits, min premi, rider availability, coverage period).
Create the LOYALTY BENEFIT section explaining the loyalty benefit mechanism with a calculation example (premi 24jt x 10 tahun = 240jt; year 25 = 240jt; year 35/45/55... = 120jt each).

Create the PREMIUM TABLE section with tables showing representative premium data for Pria and Wanita Limited Pay IDR (using data from Sample/Mdsa.html tab3 - ages 0,5,10,20,30,40,50,60 with columns Saving UP1M, Jiwa UP1M, Kritis UP1M, Kesehatan UP1M, Lengkap UP1M).

Create the CALCULATOR section following the exact pattern from Sample/Mdsa.html tab4 (Kalkulator). Must include: dropdown for Jenis Kelamin, dropdown for Usia Masuk (0-60 for Limited, 0-70 for Regular), dropdown for Mata Uang (IDR/USD), dropdown for Masa Pembayaran (Limited Pay 10 Tahun / Regular Pay), dropdown for Mode Pembayaran (Tahunan/Semesteran/Kuartalan/Bulanan), dropdown for Uang Pertanggungan (with manual input option). For Regular Pay: show rider checkboxes for MiSHC (with plan selection dropdown containing all 15 plans) and MiSCCP (with UP and plan type Essential/Complete). Display result showing premium in selected mode plus all modes grid.

Embed the COMPLETE premium data from Sample/Mdsa.html as JavaScript constants: PREMIUM_DATA object (containing all age entries from 'pria|0' through 'pria|70' and 'wanita|0' through 'wanita|70' with idr and usd arrays) and MIUHC_DATA object (containing PRIA and WANITA age-based arrays for health rider premiums). Copy these EXACTLY from Sample/Mdsa.html lines 703-707.

Implement the calculator JavaScript following the EXACT logic from Sample/Mdsa.html: showTab(), calculate(), onCurrencyChange(), onPaymentChange(), onUPChange(), onRiderChange(), updateAgeRange(), updateUPOptions(), updateMiSCCPUPOptions(), updateRiderVisibility(), formatIDR(), formatUSD(), getUPValue(), getUPText(), getMiSHCPlanNames(), getMiUHCAnnualPremium(), onMiSHCPlanChange(), onMiSCCPChange(), validateManualUP(), formatManualUP(), formatManualMiSCCPUP(), updateCheckboxVisual(). The calculator must use JSON LOOKUP only (not formulas except for Limited Pay which is simply UP/10 for saving). For Regular Pay, lookup from PREMIUM_DATA using key 'gender|age' then access idr/usd array at specific indices.

Create the FAQ section with at least 10 questions covering: What is MDSA, Unit-Link explained, No Lapse Guarantee, Limited vs Regular Pay, 5 Packages, Loyalty Benefit, Minimum premi, Age limits, MiSHC/MiSCCP riders, Payment modes, Medical check-up. Use the FAQ accordion pattern from mccp.html (faq-item, faq-trigger, faq-body).
Create the CTA section at the bottom with WhatsApp consultation link and compelling question-based headline.

Ensure all content uses QUESTION-BASED language throughout: section headings should be compelling questions that make readers think about the product value (e.g., 'Bagaimana jika ada produk yang menjamin polis tetap aktif?' instead of 'Fitur No Lapse Guarantee').
acceptance_criteria:
Page has
and
for component loading
All content uses question-based language in section headings
Keywords are highlighted with at least 3 different non-clashing colors using CSS classes
Premium tables display data for both Pria and Wanita
Calculator uses JSON lookup from embedded PREMIUM_DATA constant (not mathematical formulas)
Calculator handles Limited Pay (UP/10 for saving), Regular Pay (lookup from data array), MiSHC rider (lookup from MIUHC_DATA), and MiSCCP rider (lookup from PREMIUM_DATA indices)
Calculator displays results in all 4 payment modes (Tahunan, Semesteran, Kuartalan, Bulanan)
Calculator shows/hides rider options based on payment type selection
No JavaScript syntax errors in the embedded code
Page structure follows mccp.html pattern with sections, .container class, CSS variables from design system
verification: Run: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('/projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/public/pages/mdsa.html','utf8'); console.log('File size:', html.length, 'bytes'); console.log('Has style.css:', html.includes('/assets/style.css')); console.log('Has main.js:', html.includes('/assets/main.js')); console.log('Has site-header:', html.includes('site-header')); console.log('Has site-footer:', html.includes('site-footer')); console.log('Has PREMIUM_DATA:', html.includes('PREMIUM_DATA')); console.log('Has MIUHC_DATA:', html.includes('MIUHC_DATA')); console.log('Has calculator:', html.includes('calculate'));"

Run: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('/projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/public/pages/mdsa.html','utf8'); const scriptMatch=html.match(/<script>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/g); if(scriptMatch){scriptMatch.forEach((s,i)=>{try{new Function(s.replace(/<\/?script>/g,''));console.log('Script block',i,': OK')}catch(e){console.error('Script block',i,': ERROR -',e.message)}})}" to validate JavaScript has no syntax errors
